LanguageData.VQE_InventorGenetronAdulthood.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] became famous among engineers for designing a prototype fusion system intended to restore entire regional grids. Driven by a relentless need to solve catastrophic power shortages, [PAWN_pronoun] pushed dangerous research farther than anyone else would dare. Early reactor trials were rushed and unstable, and the accidents that followed cost many lives. Those failures never stopped [PAWN_objective]; they hardened [PAWN_possessive] belief that the work had to be finished. After countless revisions, [PAWN_nameDef] produced the prototype that made [PAWN_objective] a hero to some and a reckless visionary to others.
LanguageData.VQE_InventorGenetronAdulthood.title: restoration engineer
